summary: Iteration 39: P1 Features Testing Complete. Backend: 14/14 tests PASSED. Frontend: All P1 features verified (Revenue breakdown modal, CEO KPI breakdown modal, Company Management expandable panel).

P1-1_manager_revenue_breakdown.description: Clicking Revenue Today KPI in Manager Dashboard opens a modal with full revenue breakdown

evidence.top_items: Displayed (IPA Draft, Mojito, Chicken Wings, etc.)
evidence.closed_sessions: Displayed with tab numbers, bartender names, and amounts

P1-2_ceo_kpi_breakdown.description: CEO Dashboard KPIs (MRR, Gross Revenue, Net Profit) are clickable and show venue breakdown

evidence.kpis_with_click_hint: MRR, Gross Revenue, Net Profit all show 'Click for details'
evidence.mrr_breakdown: Total: $449.00, Demo Club Updated: 12 sessions, $15.80 tips
evidence.chevron_icon: ChevronRight icon visible on clickable KPIs

P1-3_ceo_company_management.description: CEO Companies section shows 'Company Management' heading with expandable company cards

evidence.heading: 'Company Management' heading found
evidence.expandable: Click expands to show management panel (data-testid='company-management-0')
evidence.module_toggles: 4 module toggles: PULSE, TAP, TABLE, KDS (data-testid='module-toggle-*')
evidence.account_info: User ID and Created date displayed

p0_regression.P0-1_tip_distribution: Backend API tested - tips go to specific bartender only
p0_regression.P0-2_payment_flow: Previous iteration verified - buttons present in both Tap and Table

evidence.guest_details: Names, entry times (07:17 AM), consumption amounts ($44.00, $127.00, etc.), tab IDs (#201, #305, #106, #107, #104)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 P1 features verified: (1) Manager Dashboard 'Revenue Today' KPI is clickable, opens modal with total_revenue, total_tips, sessions_count, payment_methods breakdown, top_items, and closed sessions list. (2) CEO Dashboard KPIs (MRR, Gross Revenue, Net Profit) show 'Click for details' and open modal with venue breakdown. (3) CEO Companies tab heading is 'Company Management', company cards are expandable with status buttons (active/suspended/pending) and module toggles (PULSE/TAP/TABLE/KDS). Backend uses FormData with Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded for PUT endpoints. P0 features still working.
